description: Composition Maroon viscose leggings, with an elasticated waist, contrast stitch detailing and textured diagonal striping Fit Slim-fit Wash care Machine wash warm with like colours below 40 degrees using a mild detergent Do not bleach Tumble dry low Medium warm iron Sylish and in-vogue, our design team have added a hint of retro chic to this contemporary essential. The luxe, stretchy fabric is designed to fit to your shape, making sure every day is perfect for leggings. Style this with a white shirt-dress and clunky heels or with a tunic and belt. You could try out colour blocking this with solid coloured tops or tunics from AND. Model statistics The product is a size S on a model of height 5'8”, waist 26” and hips 36”
